# Healthcare Compliance MCP

Medical device compliance intelligence for AI agents. Access FDA MAUDE adverse events, 510(k) clearances, device recalls, and ClinicalTrials.gov registry data. No API key required.

## When to call

Use this MCP when you need to:
- Check adverse event history for medical device risk assessment
- Verify FDA 510(k) clearance status for device procurement
- Find active recalls before vendor contract renewal
- Research clinical trial landscape for a therapeutic area
- Screen a medical device for compliance risk
- Assess a manufacturer's quality track record
- Generate a full compliance intelligence report

## Tools

| Tool | Price | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| search_device_events | $0.03 | Search FDA MAUDE database for adverse event reports on medical devices |
| get_device_510k_clearance | $0.05 | Get 510(k) premarket clearance details for FDA-approved devices |
| get_device_recalls | $0.03 | Search FDA device enforcement reports for recall notices |
| search_clinical_trials | $0.05 | Search ClinicalTrials.gov registry for clinical trial information |
| get_trial_details | $0.03 | Get detailed information for a specific clinical trial by NCT ID |
| screen_device_compliance | $0.15 | Composite compliance risk score combining adverse events, recalls, and 510(k) status |
| assess_manufacturer_quality | $0.10 | Multi-source quality assessment for a manufacturer across all device categories |
| generate_compliance_report | $0.15 | Full compliance intelligence report combining all FDA data sources |

## Example AI Prompt

"Screen the compliance risk for Medtronic insulin pumps — check adverse events, recalls, and 510(k) status."

## Example AI Prompt

"Generate a full compliance intelligence report for coronary stent devices including 510(k) status, recalls, and adverse events."

---

## MCP Server Details

**Endpoint:** `https://healthcare-compliance-mcp.apify.actor/mcp`

## Quick Start

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "healthcare-compliance-mcp": {
      "url": "https://healthcare-compliance-mcp.apify.actor/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

No API key required. AI agents can call tools directly via the MCP protocol.

## Data Sources

| Source | API |
|--------|-----|
| FDA MAUDE | api.fda.gov/device/event.json |
| FDA 510(k) | api.fda.gov/device/510k.json |
| FDA Enforcement | api.fda.gov/device/enforcement.json |
| ClinicalTrials.gov | clinicaltrials.gov/api/v2/studies |

## Pricing

PPE (Pay-Per-Event) — $0.03-$0.15 per tool call. No subscription required.

## SEO Keywords

FDA MAUDE, 510(k) clearance, medical device compliance, FDA adverse event reports, ClinicalTrials.gov, HIPAA compliance, healthcare compliance MCP, no API key needed, AI agent compliance, LLM regulatory research, Claude FDA screening, Cursor medical device, due diligence medical devices, vendor risk assessment, clinical trial search
